strengths: 16+ years of full-stack development with proven mastery across backend (Node.js, microservices, high-performance systems) and frontend (React, Ember.js), directly matching the role's primary stack and depth requirements

Demonstrated ability to architect and ship at scale: built systems handling millions of HTTP requests/second, optimized complex distributed systems using AWS CDK, and maintains production infrastructure — shows the architectural rigor and performance optimization focus required

Deep commitment to code quality and testing: created testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), led TDD and CI/CD adoption across teams, conducted testing workshops — aligns directly with the role's emphasis on clean, well-tested code
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in resume despite being primary stack; experience shows Node.js and web frameworks but no specific Nest.js mention, requiring confirmation of framework familiarity
Vitest not mentioned; resume references testing frameworks and custom test runners but no explicit Vitest exposure, despite it being in the primary testing stack

Security and authentication expertise not documented; while strong engineering practices evident, no specific mention of implementing or designing authentication, authorization, or security-critical systems
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with 16+ years of progressive senior and staff roles, demonstrating the architectural depth, multi-language proficiency, and quality-focused mindset the role demands. His current position directly addresses AI-agent infrastructure—a required skill—and his track record building production systems at scale shows he can deliver solutions matching the role's complexity. The absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience introduces minor onboarding risk, but his prolific open-source work on testing frameworks and mentoring activities (workshops, refactoring dojos) suggest both technical depth and the communication skills required for an effective senior engineer.
